strengths: Strong reconstruction value through one-to-one assignment.
Clear foundational role for arithmetic and enumeration.
Dependency on equality of quantity is coherent.
risks: Counting and natural numbers may eventually need separation.
Zero is not yet explicitly handled.
Cardinal and ordinal roles may require future decomposition.
recommendation: Retain as a foundational Core Truth.
Clarify distinguishability and ordered marker requirements.
Consider future separate Core Truths for zero, successor, cardinality, and ordinal position.
